Your current objective is displayed at the top of the menu screen. If you lose track
of where to go next, please check there.

From the menu screen, you can view the rumors about your sister circulating in the
village. This does not affect game progression, so feel free to check it whenever you
like. When the display is updated, a message will appear in the bottom-left corner of
the screen.

The icon in the top-left corner shows the current day of the week and time. The days
of the week cycle in order: Sun Day, Cloud Day, Mist Day, Storm Day, and then back to
Sun Day.

Time progresses through Morning, Afternoon, Evening, and Midnight, advancing the date
before returning to Morning.

Time progresses through the following two actions: 1. Watching an event. 2. Examining
the bed at home at Midnight.

From Chapter 2 onward, you can wait on the spot and freely advance time by pressing
the Q key on your keyboard or clicking the icon on the map.

Pressing the E key on your keyboard or clicking the map icon on the screen opens the
Fast Travel screen. From the map, you can quickly move to major locations in the
village.

Checking the map allows you to see your sister's location. Talking to Elly triggers
various events. If Elly's icon has changed, a special event might occur...

During the game, when \n[1] obtains a memento, you can view past recollection events
related to that item from the "Old Memories" section in the menu screen.

Memento items are hidden all over the maps. Some only appear at specific times or
dates, so be sure to search thoroughly!

In this work, voice acting will play during characters' moans and climaxes. You can
adjust the voice volume on the next screen.
